---
format:
  html:
    includes: include-after-body
---

```{=html}

	<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js"></script>

```
# אינדקס מפלצות

בחרו שדות חיפוש. החזיקו `shift` או גררו עם העכבר לבחירה מרובה.

שם המפלצת הוא תמיד חלק משדה החיפוש.

```{ojs}
data = {
  const d = await FileAttachment("monsters.json").json()
  return d
}
```

```{ojs}
cols = Object.keys(data[0])
cols2 = cols.slice(1)
```

```{ojs}
viewof theseCols =  Inputs.select(cols2, {multiple:true, value:cols2})
```

<br>

```{ojs}
viewof search  = {
  let n = Inputs.search(data,{
  columns:[cols[0]].concat(theseCols)
});
return n
}
```

<br>

::: {.column-screen .table-responsive}
```{ojs}
Inputs.table(search, {width:"auto",
format:{
    "שם": id => htl.html`<a href=#\ onclick="test('${id}')">${id}</a>`
}})

```

:::


```{=html}
<script>

function test(name){
$(document).ready(function() {
    $.get('monstersAll.html', function(data) {
      // Find the .monster div that contains this name in its text
      var $monsters = $(data).filter('.monster').add($(data).find('.monster'));
      var content = $monsters.filter(function() {
        return $(this).text().indexOf(name) !== -1;
      }).first().html();
      $('#myModal .modal-body').html(content);
      $('#myModal').modal('show');
    });
    }
);}
</script>

<!-- Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="myModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="exampleModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-dialog-scrollable modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title" id="exampleModalLabel"> </h5>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body" id="modal-text">
        ...
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">סגור</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


```
